workflow.title: Agent Workflow Templates

codeReview.name: Code Review
codeReview.description: Review code for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and best practices.

bugFix.name: Bug Fix Workflow
bugFix.description: Systematically diagnose and fix bugs with root cause analysis.

docGen.name: Documentation Generator
docGen.description: Generate comprehensive documentation for code, APIs, and projects.

testGen.name: Test Generator
testGen.description: Generate comprehensive test suites with unit, integration, and edge case tests.

refactor.name: Refactoring Assistant
refactor.description: Safely refactor code with behavior-preserving transformations.

explore.name: Code Explorer
explore.description: Explore and understand an unfamiliar codebase systematically.

performance.name: Performance Optimization
performance.description: Analyze code performance bottlenecks and implement optimizations.

security.name: Security Audit
security.description: Perform comprehensive security vulnerability scan and risk assessment.

migration.name: Migration & Upgrade
migration.description: Help migrate codebase to new versions or frameworks.

apiDesign.name: API Design
apiDesign.description: Design and implement APIs following best practices.

debugEnv.name: Environment Debug
debugEnv.description: Diagnose and fix environment configuration issues.

feature.name: Feature Development
feature.description: Systematically implement new features with design, development, and testing.

knowledgeExtract.name: Business Knowledge Extraction
knowledgeExtract.description: Extract language-agnostic business knowledge from code for cross-language refactoring.

knowledgeToCode.name: Knowledge to Code
knowledgeToCode.description: Generate complete code implementation in target language from business knowledge base, supporting cross-language migration.

multiExpertCollab.name: Multi-Expert Collaboration
multiExpertCollab.description: Launch multiple domain expert agents in parallel or serial collaboration to divide and conquer complex tasks.

collectInputs.name: Collect User Inputs
collectInputs.description: Collect target language, framework, knowledge base ID, output directory and other project information.

workflow.dagHint: Paste this Mermaid code in a Mermaid renderer to visualize the DAG.

gateway.copyWarning: Please copy and save the key. You can also copy it later from the key list.
gateway.cliSwitchProtocolReconnect: Switch to selected protocol and reconnect

gateway.cliStartGatewayFirst: Please start the gateway before using quick connect.
gateway.cliNotInstalledConfirmContent: This application may not be installed. Do you want to continue with quick connect?
gateway.searchKeys: Search by name or key prefix
gateway.sslEnableTooltip: Enable HTTPS encrypted transmission, requires certificate configuration
gateway.sslWarningDesc: When using self-signed certificates, most client programs (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) do not trust self-signed certificates by default. You need to disable SSL verification in the client program, or manually add the self-signed certificate to the system trust store.
gateway.sslUploadDesc: Upload an SSL certificate issued by a trusted CA
gateway.sslSelfSignDesc: Automatically generate a self-signed certificate for local development and testing
gateway.sslSelfSignWarning: ⚠️ Self-signed certificates are not trusted by browsers and client programs, and may be blocked or refused. Clients need to disable SSL verification (e.g., set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0).
gateway.sslPortConflict: SSL port must be different from the HTTP port
gateway.forceSslTooltip: When enabled, HTTP requests will be automatically redirected to HTTPS
gateway.settingsLockedTitle: Gateway settings are locked while running
gateway.settingsLockedDesc: To modify the listen address, port, or SSL configuration, stop the gateway first. SSL certificate changes only take effect after the gateway restarts.
gateway.templateDescClaude: Anthropic's official CLI coding assistant, collaborate with Claude directly in the terminal
gateway.templateDescCodex: OpenAI's lightweight coding agent, autonomously complete coding tasks in a sandbox
gateway.templateDescOpencode: Open-source terminal AI coding assistant, flexible code tool supporting multiple model backends
gateway.templateDescGemini: Google Gemini CLI coding agent, use Gemini models directly in the terminal
gateway.templateDescCursor: AI-native editor based on VS Code, with deep integration of code completion and chat

settings.title: Settings
settings.renderUserMarkdownDesc: Render user messages with Markdown formatting including code blocks, line breaks, etc.
settings.chatMinimapEnabledDesc: Show a floating navigation overlay in the chat area for quick message access
settings.multiModelDisplayModeDesc: Choose how multi-model responses are displayed
settings.shortcutConflictHint: Shortcut conflicts detected. Please avoid assigning the same key combo to multiple actions.
settings.shortcutExternalConflictTip: This shortcut may conflict with {{apps}} screenshot shortcut. Consider changing it to avoid accidental triggers
settings.clearConfirm: Clear all data? This cannot be undone!
settings.noUpdate: You are using the latest version
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Failed to check for updates, please try again later
settings.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete this provider? Associated keys and model configurations will also be deleted.
settings.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete all models in this group?
settings.noActiveKey: Please add and enable an API key first
settings.noActiveKeyError: Operation failed: please add and enable an API key first
settings.urlHintExclamation: Append ! to force the raw URL without auto-adding /v1
settings.customHeadersPlaceholder:
One per line, format: key=value
e.g. X-Custom-Header=my-value
settings.defaultConversationModelDesc: Default model for new conversations. Falls back to the last active conversation model if not set
settings.defaultSystemPromptDesc: Default system prompt for all conversations. A conversation-specific prompt will override this setting
settings.titleSummaryModelDesc: Model used for automatic title generation. Falls back to the conversation model if not set
settings.titleSummaryPromptPlaceholder: Generate a short title based on the conversation content...
settings.titleSummaryPromptDefault: Based on the following conversation content, generate a short and concise title (no more than 20 characters). Return only the title text, do not include quotes or any additional explanations.
settings.compressionModelDesc: Model used for context compression. Falls back to the conversation model if not set
settings.compressionPromptPlaceholder: Compress conversation history into a concise summary...
settings.compressionPromptDefault:
You are a conversation summary assistant. Please compress the following conversation history into a concise summary.

Requirements:
1. Keep all user-expressed needs, preferences, and decisions
2. Keep all key technical details (code snippets, configurations, error messages, etc.)
3. Keep pending tasks and unresolved issues
4. Organize in concise bullet points
5. Keep the summary concise, no more than 500 words
settings.temperatureTooltip: Higher values make output more random, lower values make it more deterministic
settings.topPTooltip: Controls sampling range. Lower values restrict the model to choose from the most probable tokens
settings.contextCountTooltip: Number of historical messages sent to the model
settings.maxTokensTooltip: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate
settings.frequencyPenaltyTooltip: Penalizes repeated tokens, reducing repetitive content in the output
